Typography

Technical. Human. Clear.

A two-typeface system balances a geometric headline voice with highly readable information design.

Headlines / Space Grotesk

Look up.

Space Grotesk

Use Medium, Semibold and Bold for headlines, navigation, labels and event names.

Set it with space

Use confident scale, compact tracking and short, declarative line breaks. Avoid all-cap paragraphs.

Body / Inter

Designed for information.

Inter supports the system with a neutral, highly legible voice across web, programmes, captions and practical event communications.

64

Display

Space Grotesk Bold. Reserved for campaign moments and page titles.

32

Heading

Space Grotesk Semibold. Use to group clear sections of information.

18

Body

Inter Regular. Default size for comfortable digital reading.
